name: Retention Bundle
short_description: All coupled and linked together — Daily Rewards, Achievements, Season Pass, Profile, Level, Quest, Economy and Store.
description:
Everything you need to keep players coming back:
• Daily Reward — Tres based, animation presets, 7 days + bonus, random/sequence mode
• Achievements — Modular, signal based
• Season Pass — Free and premium, level based unlock
• Profile System — Cloud saved, avatar, change username
• Level System — Fully customisable, linear/progressive/custom, icon and banner
• Quest System — Tres based, sequence and solo, signal based
• Economy and Currency — Tres based, bal check before use
• Store System — Tres based, add any number of items, need currency system

name: Universal Managers Bundle
short_description: Essential autoload managers — State Manager, Relay Manager, Auth Manager, Local Storage, Cloud Storage. Drop into any Godot 4 game.
description:
Five universal autoload managers for any Godot 4 game:
• State Manager — Set per player and global game state with signals
• Relay Manager — Simplified WebSocket relay connection for any network system
• Auth Manager — Complete authentication flow with Supabase
• Local Storage Manager — Save/load any data type to local storage
• Cloud Storage Manager — Save/load any game data to Supabase cloud storage

name: Daily Rewards
short_description: Tres Based, Animation Presets for collection card, 7 days + bonus Option, use random/sequence mode.
description: Tres based daily reward system with animation presets for collection card. Supports 7 days + bonus option with random or sequence mode. Fully customisable, drop into any Godot 4 game.

name: Wave-Based TPS Framework
short_description: Complete wave-based third-person shooter — 4 enemy types, navigation mesh, stuck detection, wave system, stats screen. Tres based, production ready.
description:
Complete TPS framework with wave-based combat system:
• Wave System — Configurable waves, increasing difficulty per wave
• 4 Enemy Types — Melee, Ranged, Tank, Fast (each with unique AI behavior)
• Navigation Mesh — Full NavMesh pathfinding for enemy movement
• Stuck Detection — Enemies auto-detect and recover when stuck on geometry
• TPS Character Controller — Smooth third-person movement and camera
• Weapon System — Tres based, multiple weapon types
• Stats Screen — Kills, accuracy, waves completed, time survived
• Signal Based — Easy integration with any Godot 4 project
• Mobile Ready — Touch controls included

name: Achievements
short_description: Tres Based with separate section for newly unlocked rewards, signal based.
description: Tres based modular achievement system with a separate section for newly unlocked rewards. Signal based, fully customisable, works in any Godot 4 game.

name: Season Pass
short_description: Tres Based with separate section for free and premium, signal based, level based unlock.
description: Tres based modular season pass with separate sections for free and premium tracks. Signal based with level based unlock system for Godot 4.

name: Profile
short_description: Multi profile with local save, avatar, change username.
description: Complete profile management — multiple profiles with local save, avatar picker, and username editing. Stats tracking and editable profiles with Supabase backend for Godot 4.

name: Level
short_description: Fully customisable, level type linear, progressive, custom, title, level icon and banner, signal based.
description: Tres based level system — XP modes: LINEAR / EXPONENTIAL / CUSTOM. Configurable thresholds, level up/down signals, max level cap, UI-ready with icons, banners, titles per level.

name: Quest
short_description: Tres Based, two types — sequence and solo, signal based.
description: Tres based quest system with two types — sequence quests (step by step) and solo quests. Signal based with progress tracking per objective for Godot 4.

name: Economy
short_description: Tres Based add any number of Currency, signal based, bal check before use.
description: Tres based currency and economy system — add any number of currencies, balance management with balance check before use, signals for UI updates in Godot 4.

name: Store
short_description: Tres Based add any number of Item, signal based, need currency system.
description: Tres based store system — add any number of items, category tabs, purchase validation, signal based. Works with any currency system in Godot 4.

name: Monetization Bundle

description:
Full monetization stack:
• AdMob — Already in desc
• Unity Ads — Already in desc
• Redeem Store — Buy outside game, redeem inside, bypass Google IAP and keep 97% of user money
• Trade System Currency — Player to player real money trade facilitation system
